title: Action Intent V1
description: Schema defining a frozen intent object for external system orchestration.

agent_id.description: The ID of the agent initiating the action (e.g., 'AGT-009').

parameters.description: The exact payload of parameters required for execution.

trace_id.description: A unique identifier for tracing the action intent.

requires_approval.description: Indicates if the action intent requires human approval. Must always be true.

status.description: The current status of the action intent.
